title: EQ - Select a value, close the EQ tab, restore defaults - it is returned to Bass
scenario: EQ setting resets to Bass as expected after performing Restore Defaults from Device Settings
steps: 2. Navigate to Home → [Device Name] → Audio Settings → Equalizer.
3. Select an EQ value (e.g., Bass, Flat, Bright, or Custom EQ).
5. Navigate to Device Settings → Reset Device → Restore Defaults.
expected: The EQ value is reset to Bass.
